name: Support incident communication policy example
answer:
During a confirmed service incident, support posts a status update every 60 minutes.
During a confirmed service incident, support posts updates every 24 hours.
Employees may carry over 10 vacation days each year.

sources.title: Support Incident Communication Policy
sources.content:
During a confirmed service incident, support posts a status update every 60 minutes.
During a confirmed service incident, customers may request incident-specific updates through support.
